problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to or, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
